title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released the Nemotron 3 series including Nano, Super, and Ultra model variants. The models combine hybrid Mamba transformer, modular test-time compute, and Latent Mixture of Experts architectures to differentiate from other open models.
writeup: Caleb Writes Code examines NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 series, released in Nano, Super, and Ultra variants. The video covers the architectural choices that set these models apart from other open releases: a hybrid Mamba transformer design, modular test-time compute, and a Latent Mixture of Experts structure. Related techniques including model pruning and test-time optimization factor into how the variants scale across sizes. The takeaway is that NVIDIA combines several distinct approaches in one family rather than relying on a standard transformer alone.
